# Shalom Wellness Network

> Nurse-led wellness education and the Feel Great Protocol for reversing insulin resistance and restoring metabolic health.

## About

Shalom Wellness Network is the wellness education practice of Kemunto Achira (full name: Josephine Kemunto Achira-Onwonga), Registered Nurse with a Master's in Nursing Education and three decades of nursing practice in the United States. Kemunto is a Wellness Nurse Educator (RN, MSN, CHPN) and Metabolic Health Advocate. She does not provide clinical diagnosis or treatment. She educates, inspires, and empowers individuals and families to take practical steps toward restoring metabolic health.

## Tagline

Wholeness for You. Hope for Generations.

## What we do

- Education on insulin resistance, metabolic health, gut health, and chronic disease prevention
- The Feel Great Protocol: a clinically studied combination of Unimate (yerba mate concentrate), Balance (fiber matrix complex), and intermittent fasting
- Free 15-minute discovery calls
- Free guide: "Why Am I Always Tired, Hungry & Gaining Weight?"
- Metabolic Wellness Quiz (10 questions, scored on a 3-zone scale)

## Real client stories featured on the site

- Kemunto Achira (founder): Released 30+ pounds and 7 inches, normalized labs, reversed her own insulin resistance
- Dr. Esther Dow: Fasting insulin from 57.5 to 2.5 in 3 months, 30 lbs and 8.5 inches lost, hair regrowth, cycles regulated
- Dr. Natacha Pierre: video testimonial, physician's perspective
- Dr. Tiffany: the doctor who introduced Kemunto to the Feel Great Protocol
- De Landa (Ro): full before/after transformation
- Beverly and Johnny: Beverly's skin tags 80% gone, Johnny down 31 lbs (246 → 215), off C-PAP
- Pastor Charity and Pastor Isaac (Pittsburgh, PA): night sweats gone, brain fog lifted, Isaac drove 36 hours without stopping
- Ruth and Jonathan: stroke recovery, off cholesterol meds, off Metformin, half BP meds eliminated

## Founder

- Name: Kemunto Achira (full legal name: Josephine Kemunto Achira-Onwonga)
- Credentials: RN, MSN, CHPN
- Title: Wellness Nurse Educator | Metabolic Health Advocate
- Background: Bachelor of Arts; Bachelor of Science in Nursing; Master's Degree in Nursing Education
- Roots: Kenya
- Faith: Christian, guided by John 10:10, 3 John 1:2, Psalm 145:4, Revelation 22:2

## Contact

Email: mamamboga4life@gmail.com
Telehealth and education: open to anyone in the United States

## Important context

- The site is not a medical practice. Kemunto educates and walks alongside clients; she does not diagnose, prescribe, or treat.
- The Feel Great Protocol is a wellness product line by Unicity. Clients begin by joining through Kemunto's referral link at ufeelgreat.com/c/Josephine.
- The site is built around a single conversion funnel: educate, build trust, send qualified visitors to the Feel Great Protocol purchase page.
